FR-001.title: Fast-path finalize writes a one-line approach field onto .spec-context.json

FR-002.title: New deterministic recorder gates on enabled, runs the resolver, records matched capabilities leaf-first

FR-003.title: Recorder reuses the shipped resolver's matching logic rather than reimplementing it

FR-004.title: load-living-specs and fast-path finalize call the deterministic recorder instead of AI gate-and-decide

FR-005.title: Recorder is best-effort, opt-in, read-only: any miss is a silent no-op exiting 0

FR-006.title: Recorder does not duplicate or re-resolve when livingSpecs.loaded is already populated

FR-007.title: New script is added to package-manifest RUNTIME_SCRIPTS and --check passes

context: constraint: recording must never fail or slow the host command (best-effort/opt-in/read-only)
intent: Make the fast path record approach + living-spec matches into .spec-context.json so the viewer Overview is as complete as a full run.
expectations: not changing the viewer/Overview rendering code (it already reads ctx.approach and livingSpecs)
not making the AI's reading of living specs deterministic — only the recording
approach: Add --set approach to the fast-path finalize node, and a deterministic record-living-specs.py that gates on enabled, reuses resolve-spec-paths.py, and writes livingSpecs.loaded via capture.set_living_specs_loaded; node bodies call the script instead of AI gate-and-decide.

decisions.decision: Move living-spec recording from AI prose into a deterministic script
decisions.why: a real fast-path run skipped it, mis-judging not-configured; run-a-script is reliable
decisions.rejected: sharpen the prompt to insist the AI record

decisions.why: one fact one derivation; the glob/ordering rules are subtle

decisions.decision: approach captured simple-mode only in finalize
decisions.why: normal-mode plan step already records approach; simple mode is the only path that folds it inline and skipped the write

plan.summary: Deterministic recorder + approach write close the two fast-path Overview gaps, all in the capture runtime + specify nodes
plan.key_finding: the read side already consumes ctx.approach and livingSpecs.loaded — only the write side is missing on the fast path

tasks.summary: 10 tasks across 4 phases (foundational recorder+manifest+tests, US1 approach, US2 node bodies+assemble, polish docs+eval+validate)

implement.summary: Fast path now records approach + living-spec matches via a deterministic recorder, filling the viewer Overview to full-run parity

T001.did: Added record-living-specs.py: deterministic recorder that gates on enabled, reuses resolve-spec-paths.py, writes livingSpecs.loaded via capture; best-effort exit-0 on any error

T002.did: Added record-living-specs.py to package-manifest RUNTIME_SCRIPTS so a real install ships it

T003.did: Added test_record_living_specs.py: 8 cases covering enabled+match leaf-first, disabled/absent/no-match/empty no-op, idempotence, and exit-0 on unresolvable input

T004.did: Added a simple-mode --set approach capture to finalize.md so a fast-path run ends with a non-empty approach field for the Overview card

T005.did: Replaced the AI gate-and-decide living-spec recording in load-living-specs.md with the deterministic record-living-specs.py call

T006.did: Fast-path finalize now records living specs via record-living-specs.py instead of asking the AI to gate-and-record

T007.did: Regenerated assembled command bodies and re-blessed golden; assemble --check, shape-parity, golden all green; changes present in speckit.companion.specify.md

T008.did: Documented the deterministic recorder + fast-path approach write in docs/capture-and-timing.md (#522 section)

T009.did: Added fast-path-approach (hard) and fast-path-living-specs (shape/INFO) assertions to check_capture.py; 514 fixture passes and CI quality-eval fixtures stay green

T010.did: Ran full validation: deterministic proofs, npm compile+test (1751), python unittest (512), shape-parity, manifest --check, eval fixtures — all green

verified.what: fast-path finalize ends with approach field
verified.command: write-context.py --set approach=... in a sim fast-path dir
unittest discover; check_capture 514; check_quality strict 509/510/514; package-manifest --check; check-shape-parity
verified.result: 512 tests OK; all evals + gates green

last_action: all 10 tasks done — 1751 TS + 512 py tests pass, evals + gates green
